subtitle: Stay on top of your medications

views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing today's medication checklist with adherence progress ring, current streak badge, per-medication quick-log buttons, and stat cards for weekly adherence and active medications count

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick entry modal to log a dose: select medication name (with recent suggestions), set dosage amount and unit, pick form and time of day, mark status (taken/skipped/missed/delayed), toggle with-food, and optionally note side effects

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Chronological log of all dose entries grouped by date, with filter chips for medication name and status, and a 30-day adherence heatmap calendar showing daily compliance color-coded from red (0%) to green (100%)

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-chart analytics: 30-day adherence trend line, per-medication compliance bar chart, time-of-day miss pattern radar, weekend vs weekday comparison, and AI-generated insight cards highlighting patterns and areas for improvement

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayDoses
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All dose entries logged today, sorted by scheduled time

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTakenCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of doses with status .taken today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayAdherenceRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of today's total logged doses that have status .taken (0.0 to 1.0). Returns 1.0 if no doses logged.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAdherenceRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average of daily adherence rates over the last 7 days. Each day's rate = taken count / total count for that day.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days ending today (or yesterday if today has no entries yet) where every logged dose has status .taken. A day with zero entries neither breaks nor extends the streak.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Maximum streak value across all historical data

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeMedications
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Unique medication names appearing in the last 30 days, sorted by frequency descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: perMedicationAdherence
viewModelComputedProperties.description: For each unique medication in last 30 days: (name, takenCount / totalCount). Sorted by adherence ascending so worst compliance appears first.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostMissedTimeSlot
viewModelComputedProperties.description: The TimeOfDay enum value with the highest combined skip+miss rate. Nil if no non-taken entries exist.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: This week's adherence rate minus last week's adherence rate. Positive means improvement, negative means decline.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (date, adherenceRate) for the last 30 days for line chart rendering. Days with no entries are included as 1.0 (no missed doses).

viewModelComputedProperties.name: timeOfDayDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: For each TimeOfDay: (slot, takenCount, totalCount) over last 30 days, for radar/bar chart of compliance by time slot

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dynamically generated insight strings based on current data: streak milestones, time-of-day vulnerability warnings, per-medication compliance alerts, week-over-week improvement recognition, side effect correlations, weekend vs weekday comparison

dailyGoal.description: 100% adherence — all medications logged for the day are marked as taken. The progress ring fills proportionally to today's taken/total ratio.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day qualifies for the streak if it has at least one dose entry AND every entry that day has status .taken. Days with zero entries are transparent — they do not break the streak but do not increment it. The streak counts backward from the most recent qualifying day.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary metric: 7-day rolling adherence rate compared to previous 7-day window, shown as percentage change with up/down arrow. Secondary: per-medication 30-day adherence with 80% threshold alert. Tertiary: time-of-day pattern analysis comparing miss rates across morning/midday/evening/bedtime slots. Also track weekday vs weekend adherence split and consistency score (1 - standard deviation of daily rates).
insights: Streak milestones: celebrate 7, 14, 30, 60, 90, 100-day perfect adherence streaks with distinct messages
Time-of-day vulnerability: flag any time slot where miss+skip rate exceeds 25% (e.g., 'You miss 40% of bedtime doses — try pairing with brushing teeth')
Per-medication alerts: highlight any medication with <80% adherence in the last 14 days (e.g., 'Vitamin D adherence dropped to 60% this week')
Week-over-week improvement: recognize positive trends >10% (e.g., 'Great job! Adherence up 15% vs last week')

Side effect correlation: if sideEffects field is non-empty on 3+ entries for the same medication in 7 days, flag for review (e.g., 'You reported side effects 3 times after taking Metformin this week')
Consistency scoring: compute standard deviation of daily adherence rates — lower deviation = more consistent. Message: 'Very consistent this month!' or 'Your adherence varies a lot day to day'
Weekend vs weekday: compare average adherence on Sat-Sun vs Mon-Fri. Flag if weekend adherence is >15% lower (e.g., 'Weekend doses are missed 2x more often than weekday doses')
Medication count summary: 'You are currently tracking N active medications across M daily doses'
